entities.name: Ilsa
entities.context: Key stakeholder who should receive a meaningful lump-sum outcome (e.g., toward a house), treated as an ethical constraint on deal design

entities.name: Laura
entities.context: High-impact advisor who should receive modest but meaningful cash outcomes relative to eventual exit size

entities.name: Camina
entities.context: High-impact advisor who should receive modest but meaningful cash outcomes relative to eventual exit size

entities.name: Relational compensation
entities.context: Default approach for lightly involved advisors: gratitude plus social gestures (e.g., dinners) rather than retroactive equity paperwork

entities.name: Cap-table compensation
entities.context: Equity-based compensation approach, reserved for high-impact contributors rather than all advisors

relationships.context: Ilsa's outcome is an ethical constraint, not handled through standard relational compensation
Laura is among the small set of high-impact people who will receive structured cash outcomes
Camina is among the small set of high-impact people who will receive structured cash outcomes
Two alternative frameworks for advisor compensation based on level of involvement and impact
